mcpExplore.title: Catalog Search
mcpExplore.intro: Semantic natural-language search over the catalog — the same MCP search_catalog tool agents use. Ask in plain language; results are the matching table branches, governed by your role.
mcpExplore.queryPlaceholder: e.g. customer lifetime value, order shipping status, SOFR reset rate
mcpExplore.noResults: No matching datasets in the domains your role can access.
